name: Server Room
narrativeHook: The server room is a cathedral of blinking lights and white noise. Rows of racks stretch into the dim distance. Sarah Lin sits at a monitoring station, headphones on, staring at packet captures she's not supposed to have.
storyArc: Sarah Lin has been capturing network traffic on the hidden VLANs and has pcap files proving their existence. The VLAN map reveals the conspiracy's digital infrastructure: VLAN 400 = Black Meridian (financial ops), VLAN 410 = Prometheus (AI training), VLAN 420 = BioSciences (Lazarus), VLAN 430 = Nightfall (kill switches), VLAN 450 = Apex (command and control). A 100Gbps fibre link connects this server room directly to floor 82 (Nightfall Command) — the same conduit C-17 seen from floor 3. Omar Hassan has been systematically restricting Sarah's access as she gets closer to the truth. She is a potential ally but afraid.

characters.role: Player — accessing Sarah's pcap files and mapping the hidden network
Network engineer. Has pcap files. Being restricted by Omar. Potential ally.
Omar Hassan — CTO. Systematically revoking Sarah's access to VLAN 400+ monitoring.

objectives.description: Access Sarah Lin's pcap files showing traffic on the hidden VLANs — proof of the undocumented network infrastructure.
Map the complete VLAN structure: 400=Black Meridian, 410=Prometheus, 420=BioSciences, 430=Nightfall, 450=Apex.
Identify the 100Gbps fibre link to floor 82 — confirming conduit C-17 connects the server infrastructure to Nightfall Command.
Discover that Omar Hassan is restricting Sarah's access — revoking her monitoring permissions on VLANs 400+ one by one.

elevatorKey.description: The VLAN map combined with the fibre link data provides the network path to the NOC on floor 10.
